visualTypes.name: qd

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: QUANTIC DOJO — digital adaptation of PHILOSOPHY (design: Galen Radtke). Hotseat for two: place Idea tiles in the center nine, they push and pull each other, three in a row is a Conclusion. Full rules: 12 unique tiles, push chains, activation cascades with choices, Rephrase/Decision/Toss/Persuade, Agreement concede, Respect token.

worldData.built_by: Claude Fable 5 — adapting PHILOSOPHY by Galen Radtke
worldData.instructions:
QUANTIC DOJO — a conversation as a duel. After PHILOSOPHY, the tabletop game by Galen Radtke. Two players, one screen.

CLICK an Idea on your side · R or the ring rotates it · CLICK a center space to speak it
If it targets a rival Idea (hollow diamond = where it looks), it fires: chevrons show where the thought is sent. Pushed lines move together; off the table means back to hand.
When your standing Ideas stir (gold), CLICK one to activate it — chains are where the game lives.

THREE IN A ROW is a CONCLUSION — the conversation ends, you prevail.
Can't place? You lose. Convinced? Click AGREE and concede with honor.
The small sun up top is RESPECT — click it to pass it when your rival says something true.
